subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed unto him who hath turned towards Him and attained unto the lights of the Kingdom when the Sovereign of might appeared with a Name whereby all were thunderstruck [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن اقبل و فاز بانوار الملکوت اذ اتی سلطان الجبروت باسم به انصعق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power of the Manifestation of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action
